title: Stalker Creepers [FABRIC]
description: This is a fabric port of "Stalker Creepers" by AtomicStrykerGrumpy
body:
[![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png)](https://www.boxtoplay.com/en/minecraft-hosting/minecraft-server)
Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great)

Fabric port of [Stalker Creepers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stalker-creepers)

Requires [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) in order to work

This is a very simple mod that changes creeper behaviour to make them stalk you

Basically what this means is that creepers will follow you around and wait for you to look at them before exploding
